preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.0.2: Auth flow rewrite — paste dialog now shows reliably on all platforms.
whatsNew: Sign-in: paste dialog now opens immediately so you always have a place to paste the code
Removed fragile in-app browser — system browser handles sign-in everywhere (password managers, 2FA, SSO all just work)
Extended sign-in timeout to 3 minutes for slower networks and 2FA flows
